meta.intent: Pressure the first meaningful mixed-blocker route plan under a single-row flood start and a central choke that has to be opened before the board branches cleanly.
meta.expectedPath: Take the central choke immediately by cutting the low vine and adjacent blocker chain, rescue the lower puppy first, then branch upward into the safer top-right rescue.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player cashes obvious side pairs for dock value before opening the choke, then runs short on actions and flexibility once water and vine pressure start compounding.
meta.whatItProves: All three blockers can coexist without hiding the rescue-order seed.
meta.notes: The rebuilt board keeps the central choke readable while surrounding it with real dock and blocker choices so the all-systems exam no longer reads sparse.
